text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh... You actually came.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon? Am I unwelcome here, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't mean it like that! I just thought I
might never get another chance to race you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad that isn't the case. ...But that doesn't
mean I'll go easy on you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I should hope not. After all...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe I can afford to go easy on you... or
can I? Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...!
Hehe, now I'm even more excited to race you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Can I assume that you'll be at your best?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Indeed! You can count on it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I know. Do I look like the kind of idiot who
doesn't check the lineup?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. Darn. I wanted to surprise you...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you even bother? I thought you were done
with racing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I came to see you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just kidding. Did I make your heart skip a
beat?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've wanted to run in all the races from the start. If
the chance is there and I'm in good shape, it's
only natural that I'd compete.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...That so?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur. This will be my final race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm hoping that you'll do your part to make it one
to remember...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Sticking me with a lead role? Pompous as ever,
princess.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're more than welcome to take on a
supporting role instead.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, I'm sure you wish to struggle against the
script written by the gods, no?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've already told you—I intend to blow everyone's
minds.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yours in particular... I'm not about to let you
leave with things like this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No matter how far you fall behind... Keep your
eyes on me, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course. I'm always watching you. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I only look ahead when I'm running, so my
sincerest apologies if I don't see you. ♪
